questions.question: What does the line `age = 36` do?

answers.text: Assigns the value 36 to the variable named age
Checks whether age is equal to 36

questions.feedback: A single = assigns. Comparing for equality uses == (covered in the next module).

questions.question: What is the value and type of `7 / 2` in Python 3?
questions.feedback: / always produces a float. Use // for floor division and % for the remainder.

questions.question: Which of these are valid ways to build the text "Hi, Ada!" given name = "Ada"?
questions.feedback: f-strings need the f prefix to substitute; + concatenates strings but can't add an int to a string.
